utterances.speaker: Richard
utterances.text: Actually , I am not here to complement the chef .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Ohh ... Oh , that is okay I hate when people come back to complement the chef .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Like I have nothing better to do !

emotion_cause.span: 5_Like I have nothing better to do !

utterances.speaker: Richard
utterances.text: Well , it was great seeing you the other night .

emotion_cause.span: 7_it was great seeing you the other night .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , good to see you too . Did you come down here to tell me that ?

utterances.speaker: Richard
utterances.text: No ! I came here to tell you something else . I came here to tell you I still love you .
